title: COVID Update April 9, 2021
excerpt: Maintaining a safe facility is a priority for us at the Edmonton Squash Club. We work closely within Alberta’s health and safety guidelines as part of this commitment. content:
Maintaining a safe facility is a priority for us at the Edmonton Squash Club. We work closely within Alberta’s health and safety guidelines as part of this commitment. As you imagine, this is sometimes complex in today’s constantly changing Covid-19 environment.  

The Stage 1 restrictions, issued by Alberta Health Services on Apr 6, 2021, have been further interpreted by SPAR and Squash Alberta as they apply to squash. The outcome is that solo and household play is acceptable for squash under the new Stage 1 restrictions. 

Good news, the club will be reopened on Saturday Apr 10, 2021 for solo practice, household play, and 1:1 coaching with one of our certified coaches. This is consistent with how we were operating prior to the Apr 6 announcement. Unfortunately the gym and steam rooms will be closed until further notice. 

Thanks everyone for your continued support! 

-Patrick Binns, on behalf of the board of Directors
